instructions.title: Complete Your Agent Setup
instructions.description: Follow these steps to set up your AI agents

steps.title: Review Required Credentials
steps.description: You need to provide credentials for 6 services

steps.title: Gather Your Credentials
steps.description: Collect API keys and access tokens for each service

steps.title: Enter Credentials
steps.description: Use our secure form to enter your credentials

steps.title: Test Connections
steps.description: We'll verify all connections work properly

steps.title: Activate Agents
steps.description: Your agents will be automatically activated
